raw_consumer_statement: My name is XXXX XXXX. XXXX recently issued a refund of {$87.00} on XX/XX/year> to my closed Citi credit card ending in XXXX. Please see the attached refund receipt for reference. I have tried contacting Citi customer support by phone, and email, but unfortunately, I was unable to get assistance. I kindly request that you issue a refund check for the refunded amount to the following address : XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX NY XXXX ASAP. Thank you so much!
